name: codereach
description: Security, code quality, SOLID analysis, AI-powered fixes, and an interactive code impact graph. Works with Ollama, Groq, HuggingFace, and more.

commands.title: CodeReach: Show Blast Radius for Current File
CodeReach: Show Impact for Symbol at Cursor
CodeReach: Safety Check (What Breaks if I Change This)

enumDescriptions: Local models via Ollama — 100% free, no account, no key
Groq cloud — free account, no credit card, very fast
Hugging Face Inference API — free account, huge model selection
Anthropic Claude — paid API key required
Any OpenAI-compatible server (LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp)
codereach.aiProvider.markdownDescription:
Which AI backend to use.

**Free options:** `ollama` (no account), `groq` (free account), `huggingface` (free account)
codereach.aiProvider.description: AI provider. Default is Ollama, which runs locally and free.

codereach.aiModel.markdownDescription:
Model name. Leave blank for the recommended default.

**Ollama:** `qwen2.5-coder:7b` `llama3.2` `codellama`

**Groq:** `qwen-2.5-coder-32b` `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`

**HuggingFace:** `Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct`

codereach.aiApiKey.markdownDescription:
API key for cloud providers.

- **Ollama / LM Studio:** leave empty
- **Groq:** free key at https://console.groq.com
- **HuggingFace:** free token at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens
- **OpenRouter:** free key at https://openrouter.ai

codereach.aiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the chosen provider.

codereach.analyzeOnSave.description: Automatically analyze the file every time you save.

codereach.enableAiAnalysis.description: Run AI deep analysis automatically when files are analyzed.

codereach.preciseRelationships.markdownDescription: Use the language server's call hierarchy for **ground-truth** caller/callee relationships in the Understanding Doc.

codereach.complexityThreshold.description: Cyclomatic complexity threshold — functions above this are flagged.

codereach.duplicateLineThreshold.description: Minimum number of identical lines to flag as a duplicate block.

codereach.languages.description: List of language IDs to analyze.
